description: Update the global organization branding in ManageEngine ServiceDesk Plus using the administrator credentials (password: administrator). Set the organization name to 'Initrode Global', address to '4120 Freidrich Ln, Suite 100, Austin, TX 78744', e-mail to 'support@initrode.com', and phone to '512-555-0199'. Upload the corporate logo from /home/ga/Documents/initrode_logo.png.
